Tier-szabaly modositas: commit+push Tier 3 -> Tier 2 (autonom). "Batran commit and push every pending changes". Tier 3 maradt: task-archive, production-deploy, package release, fizetos API.
Tier-szabaly frissites 5 fajlban: assistant-agent-cron-entrypoint, development-agent-entrypoint, triggers/README, full-autonomy-expectation, development-agent.plan

Workflow-struktura ujraepitese a CCAP/Livirrium/Helocia minta szerint kotelezo: WORKFLOW.md kanonikus belepo + phases/ + events/ + STATUS.md YAML. Ket kulonallo: WORKFLOW_DEV + WORKFLOW_ASSIST.
WORKFLOW_DEV + WORKFLOW_ASSIST canonical workflow-files (17+11 alapelv, fazis-matrix, event-lista, belepes-szabaly)
STATUS_DEV + STATUS_ASSIST YAML state-files (cycle/phase + tick/phase)
phases/dev/ - 14 fazis-fajl (00-orient ... 13-close-cycle + maintenance-grooming + maintenance-daily-report)
phases/assist/ - 6 tick-fazis (00-orient .. 05-close-tick)
events/dev/ - 8 handler (user-input, interrupt-resume, build-fail, test-fail, merge-conflict, architecture-decision, package-issue, user-needed)
events/assist/ - 6 handler (user-input, sleep-window-start/end, overdue-deadline, missed-recurring, user-needed)
log/cycles/README + log/ticks/README - archivum-szabaly

3x3 state: astral=low, mental=normal, material=low. Wave-vector down. Reflexio: 3 nap workflow-meló frusztralo, MVP=penzkereses, Kossuth ter buli utohatas, eletet visszaepiteni szandek. Tej elfogyott, nadrag felirando.
diary 2026-05-12: 3x3 reflexio (mely-mely-normal/down-vector) + workflow-rebuild lezarva + tej+nadrag stock-jelolesek
